ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic category */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* The number of words in the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated read time in minutes */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the article is featured */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Overall sentiment score of the news article */,
  "anger" REAL /* Anger sentiment score of the news article */,
  "fear" REAL /* Fear sentiment score of the news article */,
  "joy" REAL /* Joy sentiment score of the news article */,
  "sadness" REAL /* Sadness sentiment score of the news article */,
  "analytical" REAL /* Analytical sentiment score of the news article */,
  "confident" REAL /* Confident sentiment score of the news article */,
  "tentative" REAL /* Tentative sentiment score of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news source's homepage */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the news source */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the news source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., anger, fear, joy, sadness) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_sentiments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)
